ruleset.name: Magic Number Custom
ruleset.description: Detects non-idiomatic numeric literals within IF conditions.

rule.name: AvoidLiteralsInIfConditionCustom
rule.message: Magic number detected inside an IF statement! Replace with a constant.
rule.description: Captures literal numbers in IFs that are greater than 2 or less than -1, avoiding false positives with idiomatic checks (0, 1, 2, -1).
